proposed_aliases.reason: Both current records identify the B82 Limited route in the South Brooklyn B82 corridor. They match on display name, route label, limited-stop service variant, Brooklyn context, and source evidence distinguishing B82 Limited from B82 Local and B82 SBS.

validator_evidence.do_not_merge_variant_guard_checked: Current do-not-merge only guards B82 local/SBS cross-variant pairs; this proposal is limited_stop to limited_stop.

explicit_user_guards: Did not repeat stale identity144 aliases absent from current canonical JSONL: route_m23-sbs-ace, route_m79-sbs-ace, route_m86-sbs-ace, route_m34-sbs-ace, route_b82-sbs-bay-pkwy, route_m15-sbs-2010-09-14, corridor_bay-parkway-from-ave-j-to-shore-parkway, corridor_woodhaven-blvd-queens-blvd-to-107-ave.
mechanical_guards_applied: Alias and target must both be present as current record_id values in data/canonical/routes.jsonl.
Alias must not already be a current aliases.route key in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
Target must not be a current aliases.route key in data/identity-overrides/merges.json, avoiding target chains.
Pair must not appear in current data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json route pairs.
Current known local/SBS do-not-merge variant guards were respected; the B82 proposal is limited_stop to limited_stop only.
corridor_candidates_deferred: corridor_bay-parkway-avenue-j-to-shore-pkwy -> corridor_bay-parkway-cropsey was not proposed because the target is a combined Bay Parkway and Cropsey Avenue corridor while the alias is only the Bay Parkway segment.
corridor_125th-street-manhattan -> corridor_125th-st-manhattan was excluded by explicit user guard and by current do-not-merge limits guidance.
Broad same-street corridor pairs were avoided unless limits and scope were clearly identical.

command_evidence.command: jq inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
command_evidence.purpose: Confirmed override structure, current route/corridor merge aliases, and current do-not-merge route/corridor pairs.

command_evidence.command: jq route/corridor TSV summaries over data/canonical/routes.jsonl and data/canonical/corridors.jsonl
command_evidence.purpose: Found current record_id, display_name, route_id/route_name/route_label, service_variant, corridor limits, source_id, and source count surfaces for route/corridor-only candidates.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval read-only selected-pair identityKeysForRecord and guard check
command_evidence.purpose: Checked current record presence, shared route identity keys when available, existing merge status, target-chain status, and do-not-merge suppression for selected pairs.

command_evidence.command: rg prior review-note/audit search for selected route aliases
command_evidence.purpose: Checked for visible prior prep/audit overlap and confirmed current selected alias IDs are not already applied route merge aliases.
Captured source-backed display, payload, source_ids, and evidence_refs for the selected alias and target records.

forbidden_commands_not_run: No write, ask, schema, ontology, identity-review, canonicalize, campaign dedup, or provider-profile agent commands.
No edits to LOG.md, manifest, canonical JSONL, wiki pages, database, submissions, generated outputs, or submission overrides.
